author: implement-sqlalchemy-postgresql-tests
content: Completed: Added postgresql=17.9, psycopg2=2.9.10, pytest-postgresql=7.0.1 to environment.yaml; extended test/storage/fixtures.py with postgresql scenario using pytest-postgresql + SQLAlchemyStorageProvider. All 4 ACs pass, 7 storage tests green. Pre-existing SAWarning on javascript/javascript_cookies PK columns is out of scope.
